business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate - office, mercantile, and mixed-use property holdings

coverages_discussed.notes: TIV across 8 locations including Building Value, Contents Value, and BI Value

positives: Predominantly Fire Resistive and Masonry Non-Combustible construction
Diversified property types (office, mercantile, mixed-use, medical office)
concerns: All locations concentrated in Texas, exposing portfolio to single-state catastrophe risk (wind/hail/tornado)
Houston locations (LOC-002, LOC-003, LOC-006) have coastal/Gulf wind and flood exposure
Lease expiration resulted in closure of one location
TIV updated per appraisal indicating possible valuation volatility

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Portfolio of 8 commercial properties in Texas including Preston Center Tower (Dallas), Galleria Office Park Buildings A & B (Houston), Legacy Town Center Retail (Plano), Uptown Mixed-Use Development (Dallas), Energy Corridor Business Center (Houston), Fort Worth Medical Office Building, and Southlake Town Square East Wing.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: All 8 locations equipped with sprinkler systems.
